---
title: "Experience"
---

### Research Experience ###

**"Why Gandhi Rejected Violence in Mass Protest"**

Feb-March 2026

Supervisor: *Dr. Jaby Mathew*

Helped plan and run the *Politics of Nonviolence: Traditions, Tensions, and Transformations* workshop as well as the *Why Gandhi Rejected Violence in Mass Protest* lecture seminar

<u>Promotional material for both events:</u>

<div style="display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; gap: 20px;">
  <img src="Photos/Gandhi Poster.jpg" style="width: 200px; height: auto;">
  <img src="Photos/Non-Violence Poster.jpg" style="width: 200px; height: auto;">
</div>
